lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਮਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਪਿਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev maataa guradev pitaa guradev suaamee paramesuraa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is our mother, the Divine Guru is our father; the Divine Guru is our Lord and Master, the Transcendent Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਰਾਖਉ ਹੀਐ ਪਰੋਇ ॥੫੫॥
lines.translit: naanak deejai naam daan raakhau heeai paroe |55|
lines.english: Nanak: grant me the Gift of Your Name, Lord, that I may string it and keep it within my heart. ||55||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਪਦੇਸੈ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਮੰਤੁ ਨਿਰੋਧਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev daataa har naam upadesai guradev mant nirodharaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the Giver, the Teacher of the Lord's Name. The Divine Guru is the Mantra which never fails.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸਖਾ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਬੰਧਿਪ ਸਹੋਦਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev sakhaa agiaan bhanjan guradev bandhip sahodaraa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is my companion, the Destroyer of ignorance; the Divine Guru is my relative and brother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਪਾਰਸ ਪਰਸ ਪਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev saant sat budh moorat guradev paaras paras paraa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the image of peace, truth and wisdom. The Divine Guru is the Philosopher's Stone - touching it, one is transformed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੋਵਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਮਜਨੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev teerath amrit sarovar gur giaan majan aparanparaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the sacred shrine of pilgrimage, and the pool of divine nectar; bathing in the Guru's wisdom, one experiences the Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭਿ ਪਾਪ ਹਰਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਵਿਤ ਕਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev karataa sabh paap harataa guradev patit pavit karaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the Creator, and the Destroyer of all sins; the Divine Guru is the Purifier of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਲਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਹਮ ਮੂੜ ਪਾਪੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਗਿ ਤਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev sangat prabh mel kar kirapaa ham moorr paapee jit lag taraa |
lines.english: O God, please be merciful to me, that I may be with the Divine Guru; I am a foolish sinner, but holding onto Him, I will be carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਮੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਉਧਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev aad jugaad jug jug guradev mant har jap udharaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru existed in the very beginning, throughout the ages, in each and every age. The Divine Guru is the Mantra of the Lord's Name; chanting it, one is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਮਸਕਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guradev satigur paarabraham paramesar guradev naanak har namasakaraa |1|
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the True Guru, the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord; Nanak bows in humble reverence to the Lord, the Divine Guru. ||1||
Read this Salok at the beginning, and at the end. ||
Gauree Sukhmani, Fifth Mehl,
Salok:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Ashtapadee:
I bow to the Guru of the ages.
I bow to the True Guru.
I bow to the Great, Divine Guru. ||1||
I bow to the Primal Guru.
Remember in praise the One who pervades the whole Universe.
Meditate, meditate, meditate in remembrance of Him, and find peace.
Worry and anguish shall be dispelled from your body.
were created from the One Word of the Name of the Lord.
His Name is chanted by countless people, in so many ways.
The Vedas, the Puraanas and the Simritees, the purest of utterances,
- Nanak: save me along with them! ||1||
That one, in whose soul the One Lord dwells
Those who yearn only for the blessing of Your Darshan

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਗਨੀ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee mahimaa ganee na aavai |
lines.english: the praises of his glory cannot be recounted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਗਰਭਿ ਨ ਬਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran garabh na basai |
lines.english: Remembering God, one does not have to enter into the womb again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kai man bisraam | rahaau |
lines.english: The minds of the devotees abide in a joyful peace. ||Pause||
Sukhmani: Peace of Mind, the Nectar of the Name of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਜਮੁ ਨਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran dookh jam nasai |
lines.english: Remembering God, the pain of death is dispelled.
Remembering God, death is eliminated.
Remembering God, one's enemies are repelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਭਉ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran bhau na biaapai |
lines.english: Remembering God, one is not touched by fear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਕਛੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh simarat kachh bighan na laagai |
lines.english: Remembering God, no obstacles are met.
Remembering God, one remains awake and aware, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kaa simaran saadh kai sang |
lines.english: The meditative remembrance of God is in the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਸੰਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran dukh na santaapai |
lines.english: Remembering God, one does not suffer sorrow.
All treasures, O Nanak, are in the Love of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran ridh sidh nau nidh |
lines.english: In the remembrance of God are wealth, miraculous spiritual powers and the nine treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਤਤੁ ਬੁਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran giaan dhiaan tat budh |
lines.english: In the remembrance of God are knowledge, meditation and the essence of wisdom.
In the remembrance of God, duality is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran jap tap poojaa |
lines.english: In the remembrance of God are chanting, intense meditation and devotional worship.
In the remembrance of God are purifying baths at sacred shrines of pilgrimage.
In the remembrance of God, one attains honor in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਭਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai simaran hoe su bhalaa |
lines.english: In the remembrance of God, one becomes good.
They alone remember Him in meditation, whom He inspires to meditate.
In the remembrance of God, one flowers in fruition.
